channel.title: Donald Trump on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Donald Trump on MinWeb

item.title: Inside the White House: The Day Trump Was Removed From Briefing
item.description: Explore the unprecedented events of April 2026, when a high-stakes rescue mission inside the White House led to the extraordinary removal of Trump from...

item.title: Trump and Joe Rogan’s New Executive Order on Psychedelics
item.description: Explore the details of the new Executive Order on psychedelic medicine, how it impacts federal funding and FDA review processes, and what it means for your...

item.title: Trump Orders Halt to Israeli Bombing of Lebanon
item.description: President Trump has ordered an immediate halt to Israeli bombing in Lebanon, marking a major geopolitical shift following months of humanitarian catastrophe.

item.title: Trump Orders Strait of Hormuz Blockade After Talks Fail
item.description: Understand the timeline and strategic escalation behind the U.S. naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz following the collapse of high-stakes peace...

item.title: Trump’s Strait of Hormuz Ultimatum: What You Need to Know
item.description: Understand the geopolitical stakes behind Trump’s ultimatum regarding the Strait of Hormuz and how this escalation impacts global oil and regional security.

item.title: Trump Fires AG Bondi: Todd Blanche Named New Attorney General
item.description: President Trump has fired Attorney General Pam Bondi, appointing Todd Blanche to lead the DOJ amid a broader administration shakeup and internal policy shifts.

item.title: CPAC Crowd Backfires, Cheers for Trump Impeachment
item.description: Witness a surreal moment at CPAC where an enthusiastic crowd accidentally cheered for Trump's impeachment, highlighting the dangers of blind political loyalty.

item.title: Trump’s 200-Year Life Claim: Political Hype vs. Reality
item.description: Explore why claims of 200-year lifespans are political distractions that divert crucial funding from practical healthcare toward billionaire vanity projects.

item.title: Trump’s Pearl Harbor Joke: The Diplomatic Cost of a Quip
item.description: President Trump’s recent Pearl Harbor joke during a high-stakes meeting with Japan risks critical diplomatic ties and undermines vital U.S.-Japan cooperation.

item.title: Trump Demands Rate Cuts: Why the Fed Is Paralyzed
item.description: Discover why the Federal Reserve remains paralyzed on interest rates as they navigate the stagflation trap caused by global supply chain disruptions.
